title: Industry Mentorship & Hands-On Learning
bullets: Shadowed and contributed to a production LLM-powered language services platform under direct industry mentorship, gaining real-world exposure to backend architecture, API design, and cloud workflows.
Supported development of TypeScript REST APIs with Express.js and Angular; assisted in designing MongoDB schemas for project lifecycle management.
Gained practical experience with AWS services (SES/SNS) for secure email verification and automated client notifications within an active Agile business environment.

title: Junior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Tested a client web application end-to-end, identifying and resolving login authentication bugs in production code.
Built and manually tested production builds using Expo, gaining hands-on experience with cross-platform deployment workflows.
Managed API key and token access control across development environments, ensuring secure credential distribution to authorised team members.
Coordinated Jira sprint planning and helped structure development cycles for client website builds from scratch.

title: Technical Project Manager
bullets: Led the redesign and migration of the POS frontend from Tkinter to Qt, significantly improving usability and application performance.
Managed POS transaction data integrity by working closely with developers to optimise PostgreSQL queries and improve UI responsiveness.
Partnered with stakeholders to build Power BI reporting dashboards, ensuring accurate data mapping and actionable business insights.
Coordinated project planning, technical documentation, and cross-team alignment throughout the development lifecycle.
